---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Abaloparatide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Abaloparatide</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Abaloparatide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women at increased risk of fracture.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>non-syndromic esophageal malformation（99.8%）</li>
<li>esophageal disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>esophageal ulcer（99.0%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（98.9%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（98.8%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（98.1%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（97.4%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（97.4%）</li>
<li>biotin metabolic disease（97.3%）</li>
<li>esotropia（97.2%）</li>
<li>injury（97.2%）</li>
<li>vitamin deficiency disorder（96.8%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（96.7%）</li>
<li>Raynaud disease（96.4%）</li>
<li>duodenal ulcer (disease)（96.2%）</li>
<li>radiation or chemically induced disorder（96.1%）</li>
<li>segmental odontomaxillary dysplasia（96.1%）</li>
<li>florid cemento-osseous dysplasia（96.1%）</li>
<li>perinatal disease（96.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/abaloparatide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
